sections.title: When using a beer or beer tankard on the workman

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: A bit early in the day fer that ain't it?

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: Ta very much, like. That'll hit the spot nicely. Here, you can have this. I picked it up as a souvenir on me last hols.

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: I dunno rightly, but if you use a tinderbox on it, it don't half make a loud noise!

sections.title: When using another type of ale on the workman

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: No ta, not my brand of beer.

sections.title: When using a jug of wine on the workman

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: No ta, not a big wine fan, me.

sections.title: When using a bottled drink on the workman

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: A bit early in the day fer that ain't it?

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: How do. You planning on crossing this here bridge and heading up to Rellekka then?

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: Aye, 'tis a good thing we fixed this 'ere bridge, I reckon. You best be careful up there. Them Fremenniks are odd 'uns.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you fixed this bridge yourself?

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: Aye, that I did. 'Twas real thirsty work too. If only some kind stranger would buy us a bit of beer to sup, eh?

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: What with that inn at seers so close by and all, eh?

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: Just make sure yer don't get me none of that non alcoholic rubbish from that poison salesman guy at the tavern!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wasn't planning on it, no.

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: Aye, that's what I told t'gaffer. Nobody wants to go up and hang out with a buncha dumb barbarians when there's a perfectly good inn to sup in, in t'seers village.

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: Ain't much better in life than having a nice cold beer to sup on a hot day like this, eh? Better'n fixing bridges, eh?

lines.speaker: Council workman
lines.text: Just make sure yer don't get me none of that non alcoholic rubbish from that poison salesman guy at the tavern!
